main.description: Dismiss a pending policy action (§F22). The pending row's `resolution` column transitions NULL → 'dismissed' with `resolved_at` and `resolved_by_did` set; no `subject_actions` row is created, no labels emit, no strike-state recompute. The pending row stays in the table as forensic record (`confirmed_action_id` stays NULL since no action was created). A single hash-chained `pending_policy_action_dismissed` audit row commits with the UPDATE in one transaction; the moderator's optional `reason` lands in the audit row's reason JSON (the pending table itself has no `resolved_reason` column — rationale lives in audit).

pendingId.description: `pending_policy_actions.id` of the pending row to dismiss.

reason.description: Optional moderator-facing rationale for the dismissal. Echoed in the audit row's `moderator_reason` field; not stored on the pending row.

resolvedAt.description: Wall-clock the dismissal took effect, RFC-3339 Z.

errors.name: PendingAlreadyResolved
errors.description: The pending row's `resolution` column is already non-NULL (already confirmed or dismissed).
